reasoning: The FedRAMP control SC-7 (12) focuses on boundary protection, particularly host-based protection, which in Kubernetes can be mapped to network security controls. NetworkPolicies in Kubernetes can enforce ingress and egress restrictions, ensuring that pods are not unnecessarily exposed to the internet. Additionally, ensuring services are not using NodePort and that Ingress resources have TLS enabled further aligns with boundary protection by limiting exposure and securing communications.
title: Boundary Protection | Host-based Protection
